title: Xenial Flaky Slovakian Pineapple Dumplings
description: A funky and flaky Slovakian dish featuring pineapple juice, perfect for a sick day, served in a copper mug. This vegetarian-friendly recipe is a unique twist on traditional dumplings.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine flour, sugar, and salt.
In a separate bowl, whisk together pineapple juice, vegetable oil, and yeast.
Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and mix until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 5 minutes until it becomes smooth and elastic.
Place the dough in a greased bowl, cover it with a damp cloth, and let it rise in a warm place for 1 hour.
Punch down the dough and divide it into 8 equal pieces.
Roll each piece into a ball and then flatten it into a disk shape.
Place a few pineapple chunks in the center of each disk and fold the dough over to form a dumpling.
Place the dumplings in a copper mug and bake for 20 minutes.
Serve the dumplings hot in the copper mug.
